base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of beams_weapons — a projectile (special_attack_proj) from 1994 super metroid. Beam weapons — Power/Ice/Wave/Spazer/Plasma/Charged + Missiles + Super Missiles + Power Bombs + Grapple Beam. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Beam weapons — Power/Ice/Wave/Spazer/Plasma/Charged + Missiles + Super Missiles + Power Bombs + Grapple Beam
